artifact.source:
Error rate over time

ERROR lines from logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows (2026-05-11, 09:00–10:00 UTC). 22 ERROR lines total out of 100 log lines.

The 09:30 bucket accounts for 11 of 22 errors (50%), driven by a pricing upstream outage (`econnrefused`) that tripped the circuit breaker at 09:33:33 and produced a run of `503` responses through 09:36.
